---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for KattoUI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. Ex. "I wish KattoUI could ..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see. Include any UI/UX details, API ideas, or examples from other tools if relevant.

## Alternatives

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
